name: dotclaudehooks
description: Diego's Claude Code hooks for automatic commit validation, code formatting, and LSP-first navigation nudges. Enforces conventional commits, blocks emoji/co-author attribution, runs formatters (ESLint, Prettier, gofmt, markdownlint) after file edits, and nudges symbol-shaped Grep/Glob/grep-Bash calls toward the LSP tool when a matching language server plugin is installed.
